description_long: This is a small wooden cabin with horizontal plank siding and a steep, reddish-brown gable roof adorned with a regular pattern of white shingles. The roof features a single brick chimney and overhangs the walls slightly. The front facade has a central wooden door with a small round window above it, framed by a simple wooden trim. On the side walls, there are rectangular windows with yellow shutters and wooden frames, adding a rustic touch. The base of the cabin is lined with a stone or concrete foundation, providing stability and a visual break from the wooden structure. The overall appearance is cozy and functional, suitable for residential or recreational use in an urban or park setting.
description: A compact wooden cabin with a steep gable roof, brick chimney, and rustic windows and doors. The exterior features horizontal wood siding and a stone foundation.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the reddish-brown gable roof with a white shingle pattern and a single brick chimney.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting a rectangular window with yellow shutters, the stone foundation, and the round attic window above.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the roof and another window with yellow shutters.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the main wooden door, a round window above, and the gable roof structure with visible wooden trim.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with steep pitch, covered in reddish-brown shingles with a white patterned design and a single brick chimney
attribute_window_arrangement: Two medium-sized rectangular windows with yellow shutters, one on each side wall, and a single small round window centered above the front door; the arrangement is symmetrical and simple
attribute_door_placement: One main wooden door centered on the front facade beneath the round window
